title: wolfhsm: UserId is a type alias for u16, not a newtype
description: pub type UserId = u16 means any u16 is accepted where a UserId is required, with no type-level distinction. This is inconsistent with KeyId(pub u16) and NvmId(pub u16) in the same crate, which are proper newtypes. Change UserId to a newtype struct to match the established pattern and prevent accidental misuse.
